projects.name: Scribe F1
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Enable clinicians to transcribe speech to text during consultations and auto-populate clinical note fields.
**Expected Output:** Speech-to-text capability integrated into the clinical note workflow, reducing manual data entry.
**Context:** Targets Clinical Management; epic is Closed.

projects.name: Video
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Allow clients to select their preferred video platform when booking a telemedicine consultation.
**Expected Output:** Updated booking flow with video platform selection, improving client experience.
**Context:** Builds on TytoCare integration; epic is Closed.

projects.name: Pack - Points Reuse
projects.notes: Aguarda Release para Produção- aguarda terminar testes Sessões de Grupo
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Allow clients to redeem points from a previous health pack as a discount when purchasing a new one.
**Expected Output:** Discount mechanism in the pack purchase flow that calculates and applies available points.
**Context:** Depends on existing points tracking system; currently In Progress.

projects.name: Alergias Alerta
projects.notes: Aguarda Release para Produção- aguarda terminar testes Sessões de Grupo
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Add a visible allergy alert indicator in Clinical Management to warn clinicians of patient allergies before or during a consultation.
**Expected Output:** Allergy alert button/flag displayed on the patient record in Clinical Management.
**Context:** Patient safety feature; currently In Progress.

projects.name: Conteúdos Pack Saúde
projects.notes: Aguarda Release para Produção- aguarda terminar testes Sessões de Grupo
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Enrich health packs with educational health literacy content accessible to clients.
**Expected Output:** Content management area within Health Pack Management for associating articles and health resources.
**Context:** Builds on the existing Health Pack module; currently In Progress.

projects.name: VBHC - Gestão de Entidades
projects.notes: Aguarda Release para Produção- aguarda terminar testes Sessões de Grupo
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Implement the first phase of Value-Based Healthcare (VBHC) by enabling management of clinical entities and outcome measures.
**Expected Output:** Entity management screens and data structures supporting VBHC workflows.
**Context:** First of two VBHC phases; currently In Progress.

projects.name: Group Sessions
projects.notes: Aguarda Release para Produção- aguarda terminar testes Sessões de Grupo
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Introduce group consultation session capability, allowing multiple clients to attend a single clinical session.
**Expected Output:** Group session scheduling, management, and participation flows across the platform.
**Context:** New consultation type extending the existing appointment model; currently In Progress.

projects.name: Nif Optional QC
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Make the NIF (tax ID) field optional in the questionnaire table to support clients without a Portuguese NIF.
**Expected Output:** Updated tuw_questionnaire table with nullable NIF column and all dependent services updated accordingly.
**Context:** Requires WSDL update and coordination with dependent services; estimated 8h.

projects.name: Telefone e Nif Estrangeiros
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Support foreign clients by enabling non-Portuguese tax IDs and international phone formats across the platform.
**Expected Output:** Updated client registration and management forms accepting foreign NIF and phone formats.
**Context:** Regulatory and usability requirement for international client support.

projects.name: Configured Last Answer
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Allow Clinical Management to be configured to show or hide previous questionnaire answers depending on the questionnaire type.
**Expected Output:** A frontend configuration option per questionnaire controlling display of prior responses.
**Context:** Addresses flexibility in questionnaire workflows; Ready for Development.

projects.name: VBHC - Ecrãs especificos
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Implement the second phase of VBHC with specific clinical screens for outcome capture and reporting.
**Expected Output:** VBHC-specific screens for data entry and visualisation integrated into the clinical workflow.
**Context:** Follows DH72-01; Ready for Development.

projects.name: Prescription App - Bluebee
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Integrate Clinical Management with the Bluebee Prescription Platform to enable medication and exam prescriptions within the platform.
**Expected Output:** Prescription workflows for medications/exams and retrieval of historical prescription data, all within Clinical Management.
**Context:** Depends on Prescription Platform API; Ready for Development.

projects.name: Client Portal - Reschedule
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Enable clients to reschedule or cancel appointments directly from the FHvc Client Portal without contacting the clinic.
**Expected Output:** Reschedule and cancellation flows in the Client Portal with confirmation and notification handling.
**Context:** Improves client self-service capabilities; Ready for Development.

projects.name: Me1st Pre Registration
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Allow new users to pre-register for the me1st wellness app directly from the FH platform.
**Expected Output:** Pre-registration flow from the FH platform that provisions a linked me1st account for the client.
**Context:** Bridges FH and me1st platforms; Ready for Development.

projects.name: Infermedica Integration
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Integrate Infermedica's symptom assessment engine into FHvc and Clinical Management to support triage and pre-consultation workflows.
**Expected Output:** Symptom checker for clients and triage summary for clinicians, with insurer SSO support.
**Context:** Estimated 200h; In Technical Analysis with mockups and PRD available.

projects.name: Apps Integration
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Integrate external digital health applications (fitness, nutrition, wearables) into the FHvc Client Portal to enrich the client health profile.
**Expected Output:** Connected apps section in the Client Portal allowing clients to link and view data from third-party health apps.
**Context:** Estimated 320h; In Technical Analysis with PRD available.

projects.name: FHvc NPS Survey Client Portal
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Collect Net Promoter Score (NPS) feedback from clients after consultations via the FHvc Client Portal.
**Expected Output:** NPS survey triggered post-consultation with results accessible for reporting.
**Context:** Estimated 120h; currently In Technical Analysis.

projects.name: Scribe F2 e F3
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Extend the Scribe feature to automatically capture vital signal values (blood pressure, heart rate, etc.) from consultations.
**Expected Output:** Vital signs detected from speech/input auto-populated into the appropriate clinical note fields.
**Context:** Builds on DH84 (Closed); Ready for Development.

projects.name: Calendar Slots Available CM
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Show available calendar slots in Clinical Management to improve appointment scheduling visibility and reduce booking friction.
**Expected Output:** Visual indicator or count of available slots per day/clinician in the calendar view.
**Context:** Estimated 40h; currently In Technical Analysis.

projects.name: Voucher/Pontos/Descritivo Atos
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Display appointment descriptions (voucher details, points, act descriptions) on client invoices for better billing transparency.
**Expected Output:** Invoice documents updated to include appointment descriptions.
**Context:** Currently In Technical Analysis.

projects.name: CM Wait Time SAP
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Integrate SAP appointment data to display estimated wait times to clients and staff in Clinical Management.
**Expected Output:** Estimated wait time displayed on the appointment view, sourced from SAP.
**Context:** Estimated 180h; currently In Technical Analysis.

projects.name: Soft Login 2
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Improve the FHvc portal registration flow by handling edge cases such as existing accounts and activation status.
**Expected Output:** Smarter registration process detecting existing accounts and guiding users through the appropriate recovery flow.
**Context:** Second phase of DH60; currently In Technical Analysis.

projects.name: Manage Card - Client Portal
projects.briefing:
**Objective:** Allow clients to manage health insurance cards in the FHvc Client Portal, including adding, deleting, and setting a preferred card.
**Expected Output:** Card management section in the Client Portal with full CRUD capabilities for insurance cards.
**Context:** Estimated 110h; currently In Technical Analysis.
